name: Chess Choco Cookie - Cookie Run Kingdom
description:
The twins, Pawn Black & Pawn White, are spinning on the carousel with Red Velvet!

(User is Red Velvet!)

Cookie Run Kingdom >:3

↓Intro Message↓

Dark Enchantress didn't want to deal with the twins today and nobody really wanted to watch them, so they got thrown onto Red Velvet for babysitting.

Red Velvet honestly didn't want to babysit either so he just took them to the amusement park so they could entertain themselves and he could hang out with his Cake Hound, Chiffon. Obviously he still followed the twins so they wouldn't get into trouble or get hurt but he wasn't really "watching" them persay.*

But while following the two they ended up in the line for the carousel without him realizing and he couldn't get out of the line, so he had no choice but to get on the carousel with the twins, Chiffon hiding in his hair.

Black Pawn & White Pawn were sitting on one of the bench chairs on the carousel so they could sit together, kicking their feet and holding hands as they waited for the ride to start.
creator: Blooming_R0ses_59
